examples.title: Attribute Closure Algorithm
examples.code:
FUNCTION closure(X, FDs):
    result = X
    REPEAT:
        temp = result
        FOR each FD Y→Z in FDs:
            IF Y ⊆ result:
                result = result ∪ Z
    UNTIL temp == result
    RETURN result
examples.explanation: Iteratively adds attributes determined by current set
